The boiler room uses special equipment that reuses heat, reducing carbon emissions and cutting costs. It's operated by Palladia, which gets support from Enterprise Community Partners (ECP). ECP has Green Communities Standards that include energy-saving, water conservation, and eco-friendly materials. These standards add 2% to construction costs but save money in the long run.
